arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjær’s appointment at Besiktas unequivocally split opinion in Türkiye but the Norwegian has silenced his critics with a fantastic start to his tenure....

arts.ttl: How to watch Real Sociedad vs Man United - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to continue their Europa League charge against last-16 opponents Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd star slammed for defending Glazers: Factually incorrect and disrespectful
arts.sum: “I think they have spent money for Manchester United in certain places and, like, ultimately the criticism of the ownership from fans - of any club but if you look at Manchester United - it is oftentimes one-sided,” Howard told beIN Sports . Man Utd have failed to win the Premier League title for 12 years, despite over €2 billion being spent on transfers during that time, but Howard has defended the Glazer family amid immense criticism aimed at the American billionaires.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane receives backing to replace Ruben Amorim as Sir Jim Ratcliffe sent message
arts.sum: With patience wearing thin over Manchester United's dismal results under Ruben Amorim, Roy Keane has now been named as someone who could change the culture inside the Red Devils dressing room

arts.sum: Live updates from the Reale Arena as Man United face Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Red Devils launch Jose Mourinho scouting mission
arts.sum: Akcicek has just over three years remaining on his current Fenerbahce contract, but Man Utd are reportedly keeping close tabs on his progress in Turkey as they ponder a possible pursuit during the 2025 summer transfer window. Manchester United have reportedly sent scouts to watch Yusuf Akcicek in action during Fenerbahce ’s Europa League round of 16 first-leg clash against Rangers on Thursday evening.
